name: additional-context-menus
description: Enhanced right-click context menus for Node.js development - React, Angular, Express, Next.js, Svelte, Vue, TypeScript & JavaScript with intelligent code operations.

additionalContextMenus.enabled.description: Enable or disable Additional Context Menus extension

additionalContextMenus.autoDetectProject.description: Automatically detect Node.js projects for context menu visibility

additionalContextMenus.supportedExtensio.description: File extensions where context menus will be shown

additionalContextMenus.copyCode.insertio.description: Where to insert copied code in target file

additionalContextMenus.copyCode.handleIm.description: How to handle import statements when copying code

additionalContextMenus.saveAll.showNotif.description: Show notification after saving all files

additionalContextMenus.saveAll.skipReadO.description: Skip read-only files when saving all

additionalContextMenus.terminal.type.description: Type of terminal to open when using 'Open in Terminal' command

additionalContextMenus.terminal.external.description: Custom command for external terminal. Use {{directory}} as placeholder for directory path

additionalContextMenus.terminal.openBeha.description: Which directory to open in terminal

additionalContextMenus.secretDetection.e.description: Enable or disable secret detection feature

additionalContextMenus.secretDetection.s.description: Automatically scan for secrets when saving a file
Show suggestions for proper secret management when secrets are detected

additionalContextMenus.secretDetection.e.description: Custom regex patterns to exclude from secret detection (e.g., 'example', 'test', 'placeholder')

additionalContextMenus.importSorting.ena.description: Enable or disable import sorting feature

additionalContextMenus.importSorting.gro.description: Order of import groups: external (node_modules), internal (monorepo packages), relative (./, ../), type (type-only imports)

additionalContextMenus.importSorting.sor.description: Sort imports alphabetically within each group

additionalContextMenus.importSorting.gro.description: Add blank lines between import groups

additionalContextMenus.importSorting.sep.description: Separate type-only imports into their own group

additionalContextMenus.importSorting.new.description: Number of newlines between import groups

additionalContextMenus.bundleAnalysis.en.description: Enable or disable bundle analysis feature

additionalContextMenus.bundleAnalysis.au.description: Automatically analyze bundle size after build completes

additionalContextMenus.bundleAnalysis.sh.description: Threshold in KB for highlighting large modules
Threshold in KB for highlighting large bundles

additionalContextMenus.complexityAnalysi.description: Enable or disable complexity analysis feature
Maximum function length in lines before being flagged as complex
Maximum cyclomatic complexity before a function is flagged as complex
Maximum nesting depth before a function is flagged as complex
Maximum number of parameters before a function is flagged as complex
Show refactoring suggestions when complexity issues are detected

additionalContextMenus.performanceProfil.description: Enable or disable performance profiler feature
Minimum estimated execution time threshold for flagging functions (abstract units)
Minimum estimated memory usage threshold for flagging functions (abstract units)
Maximum nesting depth before a function is flagged
Analyze async operations for potential performance issues
Show optimization suggestions when performance bottlenecks are detected

additionalContextMenus.snippetManager.en.description: Enable or disable snippet manager feature

additionalContextMenus.snippetManager.st.description: Where to store snippets - workspace (.vscode/snippets) or global storage

additionalContextMenus.snippetManager.au.description: Automatically detect placeholders in snippets using regex pattern

additionalContextMenus.snippetManager.pl.description: Regex pattern to detect placeholders in snippets (must include one capture group for the placeholder name)

additionalContextMenus.commitMessageGene.description: Enable or disable commit message generator feature
Include list of changed files in commit message body
Maximum number of commit message suggestions to generate
Default commit type when unsure what to use

additionalContextMenus.propsGenerator.en.description: Enable or disable component props generator feature

additionalContextMenus.propsGenerator.in.description: Infer TypeScript types from prop usage patterns

additionalContextMenus.propsGenerator.de.description: Detect optional props based on default values in component definition

additionalContextMenus.propsGenerator.in.description: Include JSDoc comments in generated interfaces

additionalContextMenus.propsGenerator.ge.description: Generate exported interfaces that can be imported by other files

additionalContextMenus.propsGenerator.st.description: Use strict type inference (marks all non-boolean props as required by default)

additionalContextMenus.duplicateCodeDete.description: Enable or disable duplicate code detection feature
Minimum number of lines for a code block to be considered for duplicate detection
Minimum similarity threshold (0.5 to 1.0) for code blocks to be considered duplicates
Ignore comments when comparing code blocks
Normalize whitespace when comparing code blocks
Maximum number of files to scan for duplicates
Show refactoring suggestions when duplicate code is detected

additionalContextMenus.unusedDependencyD.description: Enable or disable unused dependency detection feature
Include devDependencies when scanning for unused dependencies
Identify dependencies that should be in devDependencies
Maximum number of files to scan for imports

additionalContextMenus.envVariableManage.description: Enable or disable environment variable manager feature
Generate TypeScript interfaces for environment variables
Name for the generated TypeScript interface

additionalContextMenus.errorPatternDetec.description: Include missing error handlers in detection
Include empty catch blocks in detection
Show suggestions for detected error patterns

additionalContextMenus.fileNamingConvent.description: Enable or disable file naming convention validation feature
Automatically validate file names on save
Default naming convention to validate against
Show quick fix suggestions when naming violations are detected
Regex patterns for file names to ignore during validation (e.g., '^\\.', '^test-', '^spec-')
File extensions to include in naming convention validation
Severity level for naming convention violations

additionalContextMenus.bulkFileRenamer.e.description: Enable or disable bulk file renamer feature

additionalContextMenus.bulkFileRenamer.u.description: Automatically update import statements when renaming files

additionalContextMenus.bulkFileRenamer.s.description: Show preview of changes before applying rename operation

additionalContextMenus.bulkFileRenamer.h.description: Detect and handle circular dependencies during rename operations

additionalContextMenus.bulkFileRenamer.f.description: File extensions to include in bulk rename operations

additionalContextMenus.hookExtraction.en.description: Enable or disable hook extraction feature

additionalContextMenus.hookExtraction.pr.description: Preserve import statements when extracting code into a hook

additionalContextMenus.hookExtraction.in.description: Automatically infer TypeScript types for hook parameters and return values

additionalContextMenus.hookExtraction.au.description: Automatically detect React hooks in the selected code

additionalContextMenus.hookExtraction.de.description: Default name for extracted custom hooks

additionalContextMenus.hookExtraction.ho.description: Default directory name for storing extracted hooks

additionalContextMenus.coverageReporter..description: Enable or disable coverage reporter feature
Show uncovered lines in the coverage report
Highlight covered and uncovered lines in the editor

additionalContextMenus.jestTestGenerator.description: Enable or disable Jest test generator feature
Include edge case tests (empty strings, zeros, nulls, etc.)
Include error case tests (null/undefined parameters, invalid types, etc.)
Default directory name for storing generated test files
Type of test setup to include in generated test suites
Path to custom test setup file (used when setupType is 'custom')

additionalContextMenus.vitestTestGenerat.description: Enable or disable Vitest test generator feature
Include edge case tests (empty strings, zeros, nulls, etc.)
Include error case tests (null/undefined parameters, invalid types, etc.)
Default directory name for storing generated test files
Type of test setup to include in generated test suites
Path to custom test setup file (used when setupType is 'custom')
Include Vitest UI comments for better test visualization
Custom mock patterns for generating mock data

additionalContextMenus.playwrightTestGen.description: Enable or disable Playwright test generator feature
Include edge case tests (empty states, loading states, etc.)
Include error case tests (API errors, network errors, etc.)
Default directory name for storing generated E2E test files
Generate page object classes for better test maintainability
Default directory name for page object files
Prefer data attributes for selectors (e.g., data-testid)
Default waiting strategy for test assertions
Path to custom test fixture file

additionalContextMenus.nestjsModuleGener.description: Enable or disable NestJS module generator feature
Include imports section in generated modules
Include controllers section in generated modules
Include providers section in generated modules
Include exports section in generated modules
Add comments indicating global module imports
Default organization pattern for generated modules

additionalContextMenus.nestjsEntityGener.description: Enable or disable NestJS entity generator feature
Generate repository class with the entity
Generate DTO (Create/Update) classes with the entity
Include class-validator decorators in generated code
Database ORM to use for entity generation
Default path for generated entity files
Include Swagger decorators for API documentation

additionalContextMenus.nestjsGuardGenera.description: Enable or disable NestJS guard generator feature
Generate JWT strategy along with the guard
Generate auth module for global guard configuration
Generate decorators for roles and permissions

additionalContextMenus.graphqlResolverGe.description: Enable or disable GraphQL resolver generator feature
Generate DataLoader classes to prevent N+1 query problems
Include try-catch error handling in generated resolvers
Include authentication guards in generated resolvers
Default directory path for generated resolver files
Generate service interfaces for resolver methods

additionalContextMenus.nestjsDTOGenerato.description: Enable or disable NestJS DTO generator feature
Include class-validator decorators in generated DTOs
Include Swagger decorators in generated DTOs
Default suffix for DTO classes (e.g., Dto, DTO)
Create a base DTO class that other DTOs extend
Include a partial DTO class for update operations
Include JSDoc comments with examples in generated DTOs

additionalContextMenus.graphqlSchemaGene.description: Enable or disable GraphQL schema generator feature
Include descriptions for types and fields in the generated schema
Default directory path for generated schema files
Enable Apollo Federation support for the generated schema
Generate enum types from TypeScript enums
Generate interface types from TypeScript interfaces
Generate union types for discriminated unions

additionalContextMenus.nextjsPageScaffol.description: Enable or disable Next.js page scaffolder feature
Default directory pattern for page scaffolding
Include layout file generation (App Router only)
Include loading state file generation (App Router only)
Include error boundary file generation (App Router only)
Include not found page file generation (App Router only)
Default component type for generated pages
Default directory path for generated pages

additionalContextMenus.nuxtjsPageGenerat.description: Enable or disable Nuxt 3 page generator feature
Include SEO metadata generation for pages
Include asyncData pattern option for pages
Include useFetch pattern option for pages
Default directory path for generated pages

additionalContextMenus.sveltekitPageGene.description: Enable or disable SvelteKit page generator feature
Include SEO metadata generation for pages
Include server load function (+page.server.ts) generation option
Include error handling page (+error.svelte) generation option
Default directory path for generated pages

additionalContextMenus.nuxtComposableGen.description: Enable or disable Nuxt composable generator feature
Include auto-import statements from Vue and Nuxt
Include server-side rendering support in composables
Generate explicit return type annotations for composables
Default directory path for generated composables
Add JSDoc comments to generated composables
Include Promise return type annotations for async functions

additionalContextMenus.openApiSpecGenera.description: Enable or disable OpenAPI specification generator feature
Output format for the OpenAPI specification
Include descriptions in the generated OpenAPI specification
Include example values in the generated OpenAPI specification
Exclude private routes (prefixed with _) from the specification
Directory where the OpenAPI specification file will be saved
Default server URL to include in the OpenAPI specification
Include security schemes (bearer auth) in the specification

additionalContextMenus.packagejsonScript.description: Enable or disable package.json scripts manager feature
Show predefined script templates when adding scripts
Automatically detect package manager (npm, yarn, pnpm) from workspace
Default package manager to use when auto-detection is disabled

additionalContextMenus.prismaSchemaGener.description: Enable or disable Prisma schema generator feature
Include comments in the generated Prisma schema
Include index configuration when generating models
Default directory path for generated Prisma schema files
Default database provider for the data source
Enable relation field generation when creating models
Enable migration generation features in the Prisma schema
Default field type for the primary key ID field

additionalContextMenus.prismaClientGener.description: Enable or disable Prisma client generator feature
Default directory path for generated Prisma client wrapper files
Include transaction methods in generated wrapper
Include error handling in generated wrapper
Include soft delete method in generated wrapper
Include pagination methods in generated wrapper
Include caching layer in extended repository
Include validation methods in extended repository
Generate repository interface along with implementation
Error handling style to use in generated code

additionalContextMenus.reactQueryGenerat.description: Enable or disable React Query generator feature
Default directory name for generated React Query hooks
Generate infinite query hooks for pagination
Include optimistic update patterns in mutations
Include cache invalidation in mutation hooks
Generate API service functions alongside hooks

additionalContextMenus.expressRouteGener.description: Enable or disable Express route generator feature
Include try-catch error handling in generated routes
Include validation patterns in generated routes
Use async/await in generated route handlers
Allow adding middleware to generated routes
Include JSDoc comments in generated routes
Default path prefix for generated routes
Router pattern to use for generated routes
Export style for generated route modules
How to extract parameters from request object
Response pattern to use in generated routes

additionalContextMenus.apiClientGenerato.description: Target frontend framework for API client
Generate TypeScript code instead of JavaScript
Output directory for generated API client files
Base API URL to prepend to all endpoints (e.g., http://localhost:3000)

additionalContextMenus.svelteActionGener.description: Generate TypeScript code for Svelte actions
Generate TypeScript interfaces for action parameters
Include JSDoc comments in generated actions
Default directory for generated action files
Include usage examples in generated action files

additionalContextMenus.sveltekitServerGe.description: Enable or disable SvelteKit server endpoint generator feature
Generate TypeScript code for server endpoints
Include error handling in generated endpoints
Include input validation in generated endpoints
Default directory path for generated server endpoints
Export pattern for HTTP method handlers

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.enable.description: Enable or disable task runner integration feature

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.autoDe.description: Automatically detect available task runners in the workspace

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.showOu.description: Show output panel when running tasks

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.clearO.description: Clear output panel before running a new task

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.saveOu.description: Save task output to a file

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.output.description: Directory where task output files will be saved

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.maxOut.description: Maximum number of output lines to keep in memory

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.showEr.description: Parse and highlight errors and warnings in task output

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.status.description: Show task runner status in the status bar

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.suppor.description: Task runners to detect and support

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.taskLi.description: Interval in milliseconds to auto-refresh task list

additionalContextMenus.taskRunner.defaul.description: Default behavior for terminal when running tasks

additionalContextMenus.unusedImportDetec.description: Enable or disable unused import detection feature
Automatically detect unused imports when saving a file
Show unused imports as warnings in the editor
Ignore type-only imports when detecting unused imports
Ignore unused imports that are only used in type annotations
Include default imports in unused import detection
Include namespace imports in unused import detection
Automatically remove unused imports when saving a file
Regex patterns for import names to exclude from detection (e.g., '^React$', '^_.')

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.ena.description: Enable or disable Suggestion Hub feature

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.aut.description: Automatically analyze files when they are opened

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.max.description: Maximum number of suggestions to show per category

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.sev.description: Severity levels to include in suggestions

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.sho.description: Show quick action buttons for common fixes

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.sor.description: How to sort suggestions in the hub

additionalContextMenus.suggestionHub.ena.description: Enable one-click auto-fix for applicable suggestions

additionalContextMenus.workspaceSymbolSe.description: Enable or disable workspace symbol search feature
Maximum number of results to return for symbol search
Minimum fuzzy match score threshold (0 to 1, where 1 is exact match)
Default symbol kinds to include in search results
Show preview of symbol code when searching
Group search results by workspace and symbol kind

additionalContextMenus.symbolReferenceMa.description: Enable or disable symbol reference mapper feature
Default call hierarchy direction to show
Include import relationships in symbol analysis
Maximum number of results to return for reference mapping
Show references in a quick pick menu for easy navigation
Show call hierarchy in a tree view format

additionalContextMenus.zodSchemaGenerato.description: Enable or disable Zod schema generator feature
Include JSDoc comments in generated schemas
Include custom error messages in validation
Include validation refinements for custom error handling
Generate TypeScript type inferred from Zod schema
Generate separate input and output types for the schema
Include Zod import statement in generated schemas
Use const instead of export for schema declaration
Use z.coerce.date() for Date type schemas
Default schema name when generating from interfaces
Export the generated schema by default

additionalContextMenus.angularServiceGen.description: Enable or disable Angular service generator feature
Include HttpClient in generated Angular services
Generate CRUD methods (getAll, getById, create, update, delete) by default
Include RxJS error handling with catchError in generated methods
Include JSDoc comments for generated methods
Default path where Angular services will be generated
Default base API URL for HTTP requests

additionalContextMenus.apiDocumentationG.description: Enable or disable API documentation generator feature
Include @example tags from JSDoc in documentation
Include type aliases and interfaces in documentation
Group documentation by category (classes, functions, interfaces)
Add table of contents to generated documentation

additionalContextMenus.architectureDiagr.description: Enable or disable architecture diagram generator feature
Glob patterns for files to include in diagram analysis
Directory names to exclude from diagram analysis
Directory depth to use for module grouping (1-5)
Include external npm package dependencies in the diagram
Show file count in each module node
Include styling information in the diagram

additionalContextMenus.branchNamingConve.description: Enable or disable branch naming convention validation
Validate branch name when checking out branches
Validate branch name when creating new branches
Custom branch naming patterns as regex patterns
Allow issue numbers in branch names
Suggest branch names when validation fails

editor/context.when: editorTextFocus && editorHasSelection && additionalContextMenus.enabled && additionalContextMenus.isNodeProject && additionalContextMenus.hasSvelte && resourceExtname =~ /\.svelte$/
editorTextFocus && editorHasSelection && additionalContextMenus.enabled && additionalContextMenus.isNodeProject && additionalContextMenus.hasVue && resourceExtname =~ /\.vue$/
editorTextFocus && editorHasSelection && additionalContextMenus.enabled && additionalContextMenus.isNodeProject && additionalContextMenus.hasAngular && resourceExtname =~ /\.html$/
editorTextFocus && editorHasSelection && additionalContextMenus.enabled && additionalContextMenus.isNodeProject && additionalContextMenus.hasVue && resourceExtname =~ /\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|vue)$/

scripts.publish: npm run publish:marketplace && npm run publish:ovsx
scripts.test: rm -rf dist && npm run build && npm run create-minimal && tsc -p ./tsconfig.test.json && node ./dist/test/e2e/runE2ETest.js
scripts.test:full: rm -rf dist && npm run build && tsc -p ./tsconfig.test.json && SKIP_OPTIMIZATION=true node ./dist/test/e2e/runE2ETest.js
